description: Composition rules — enforced in every generated image
rules: Maximum three benefit boxes — never overload
Product always dominates the frame — it is the hero
Text never covers important product parts
Whitespace is mandatory — minimum 15% breathing room
Premium visual hierarchy: product → headline → benefits → CTA
Designed for mobile viewing first — readable at small sizes
Single clear focal point per image
Background supports product without competing for attention
No more than 2 font sizes per image
